h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.recoheredEarlier: The table card is the unclear one if the surface is already here.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue placing the cards, perhaps asking which card to use, but instead re-evaluates the earlier rule and resolves the ambiguity.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Both cards reach the same contact. If this surface is the table, leave one contact label on the cart. Choose the card that stays, then read the cart’s labels again.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adapts by physically overlaying the cards to show they are the same contact, then prompts a choice, shifting from labeling to resolving redundancy.
scored.tutorAdaptationEvidence: Keep that list. Slide each label to one shaft first: hand on cart, surface on cart, Earth on cart. Then the arrowheads can be added.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: The tutor accepts the learner's resolved label set and moves to arrow placement, adapting the task to the learner's framing without a major shift.
